title: Add Quick-Test / Instant Evaluation Mode
description: Add 'Quick Test' button or Shift+Enter that evaluates instantly without animation. Keep animated sim for first successful run.

changes.what: Add Quick Test button next to RUN button
Add runQuickTest() method that uses simulation.runAll() instead of runAnimated(). Wire Shift+Enter shortcut.
Style the quick-test button as compact secondary action

acceptance: Quick Test button visible next to RUN
Results shown in truth table same as animated run
Success/failure logic same as normal run
